attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT COALESCE(ORGANIZATION_ID,0) AS ORGANIZATION_ID,
CAST(COALESCE(CAST(LAST_UPDATE_DATE AS VARCHAR(19)),CAST(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS VARCHAR(19))) AS TIMESTAMP(0)) AS LAST_UPDATE_DATE,
'-1' AS LAST_UPDATED_BY,
CAST(SUBSTR(CREATION_DATE,1,19) AS TIMESTAMP(0)) AS CREATION_DATE,
'-1' AS CREATED_BY,
MASTER_ORGANIZATION_ID,
COALESCE(NEGATIVE_INV_RECEIPT_CODE,0) AS NEGATIVE_INV_RECEIPT_CODE,
COALESCE(STOCK_LOCATOR_CONTROL_CODE,0) AS STOCK_LOCATOR_CONTROL_CODE,
ORGANIZATION_CODE,
DISTRIBUTED_ORGANIZATION_FLAG,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS GES_UPDATE_DATE,
0 AS BATCH_ID,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS CREATE_DATETIME,
'I' AS ACTION_CODE,
OFFSET_NUMBER,
PARTITION_NUMBER,
RECORD_COUNT
FROM
$$STGDB.PST_CLOUD_HR_ALL_ORG_UNITS
